TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Fuad_Masum, title = Fuad_Masum, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fuad_Masum} }

S.FORM: = Fuad Masum = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Fuad Masum ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Iraq ta sayang o kiya ka Fuad Masum, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Mohamed Fuad Masum (Kari Kud : ŔĀŔąō¶ōßōĮ ŔÖŘēōĻō≥ŔąŔąŔÖ‚Äé, kari Arabian: ŔĀō§ōßōĮ ŔÖōĻōĶŔąŔÖ‚Äé, kngkawas 1938 idas 1 diyax 1Ôľć), mdhu balay sediq Kud seyjicya. Kngkawas 1992 wada mangal Iraq Kurdistan muway bay congri. Mniq kngkawas 2003 mqraq ka Saddam Hussein cngcweyn daw, Fuad Masum ka mnngalan Iraq Kokomin Gikay Rinji Gicyo, kiya u pusu balau snbarah Iraq burah keyngpo uri. Mniq kngkawas 2014 Iraq Gikay seyngkyo mnhdu daw, wada wewan phiyu tu7 soto Iraq, kiya ka lmutuc Jalal Talabani daw tu2 uxay sediq Arabian na soto Iraq. Nrading niya kndusan mi kyoikuśó©śúüÁöĄÁĒüśīĽŚíĆśēôŤā≤ Mohamed Fuad Masum pa mntuting tudaya Iraq nniqan Koya na Khabanen. Mniq Kurdistan pyasan slhayan snhiyan muyas, hiti daw mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Baghdad smluhay horicu mi waya Islam kyo. Kngkawas 1958, Fuad Masum musa Pyasan Tubeyhing Cairo Al-azhar mhdu pnyasan niya tubaraw kyoiku. Kngkawas 1968 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Basra ngalan mptusa. Kngkawas 1975 mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Al-azhar na Islam ceswey hakasey sweywey. Kndusan SeyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į KyosangtoŚÖĪÁĒĘťĽ® Fuad Masum mniq kngkawas 1962 tumal Iraq Kyosangto, kngkawas 1964 musa Syria mtqita Syria Kyosangto suki Khalid Bakdash, wada mkla Khalid Bakdash qnita niya sediq Kud daw, Fuad Masum pa wada malax Kyosangto dmi tumal Kurdistan Mincu Tang. Kurdistan Mincu TangŚļęÁąĺŚĺ∑śĖĮŚĚ¶śįĎšłĽťĽ® Kngkawas 1968 Fuad Masum u ngalan Kurdistan Mincu Tang mniq Basra na dayhyo, dhuq kngkawas 1975. Kngkawas 1976 wada mnKurdistan Umalu Qnlhangan Ryeynmong (PUK) pusu pnhiyu niya uri. Kngkawas 1992, Fuad Masum ka mnKurdistan dayhyotwan cngweyn mi tbrinah miyah Baghdad, wada Mpbatas Keyngpo Yingkay uri. Kngkawas 2004 cida, wada mtu1 Dayhyo Yingkay na gicyo. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Spuda Iraq babaw mccbu hiti na seyji kcyu, qpahun congri Iraq u, kiya ka snpeyyah knhbaraw niya Syeypay ka mangal qpahun, qpahun gikay na gicyo u Syunnipay ka mangal qpahun, kiya mi soto u sediq Kud ka mangal qpahun. Kngkawas 2014 cida, Fuad Masum pa wada phyuwan gikay tu7 soto Iraq. Kwohuy u mniq idas 7 diyax 24 muda mn2 rwen meytaq hyo, mniq 269 hyo ka kcka bneytaq hyo pa, Fuad Masum u wada mangal mbiyax 211 hyo, pnsung hiya ka Barham Saleh u wana balay 17 hyo. Mniq meytaq soto hyo brah cida, Ryeynhkwo misucang Pan Ciwen u mniq Baghdad mtqita Iraq congri Macchili daw mniq kcka cicehuy, rmngaw ka hiya: 'Iraq saya pa wisu snturung smtali kndusan, so muda mkala niyi u, kasi ka spuda pssli phiyu kingal niqan balay llabang lhbun na seyhu, kingal malu muda psbalay knkana pnslhbnan syakay cyunti na seyhu, kiya ka knkana quri ddaun anjeyng, seyji, syakay mi keyjay'. Papak
S.PHON: = *uad masum = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka *uad masum ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan i…ĺaq ta sajaŇč o kija ka *uad masum, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. mońßam…ôd *uad masum (ka…ĺi kud : ***** ********, ka…ĺi a…ĺabian: **** ******, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), mdńßu balaj s…ôdiq kud s…ô…üi ¶ja. kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal i…ĺaq ku…ĺdistan muwaj baj ¶oŇč…ĺi. mniq kŇčkawas **** mq…ĺaq ka saddam ńßuss…ôin ¶Ňč ¶w…ôn daw, *uad masum ka mnŇčalan i…ĺaq kokomin gikaj …ĺin…üi gi ¶jo, kija u pusu balau snba…ĺańß i…ĺaq bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo u…ĺi. mniq kŇčkawas **** i…ĺaq gikaj s…ôŇčkjo mnńßdu daw, wada w…ôwan pńßiju tu* soto i…ĺaq, kija ka lmutu ¶ …üalal talabani daw tu* uxaj s…ôdiq a…ĺabian na soto i…ĺaq. n…ĺadiŇč nija kndusan mi kjoiku******** mońßam…ôd *uad masum pa mntutiŇč tudaja i…ĺaq nniqan koja na kńßaban…ôn. mniq ku…ĺdistan pjasan slńßajan snńßijan mujas, ńßiti daw mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč bagńßdad smluńßaj ńßo…ĺi ¶u mi waja islam kjo. kŇčkawas ****, *uad masum musa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶ai…ĺo al-a*ńßa…ĺ mńßdu pnjasan nija tuba…ĺaw kjoiku. kŇčkawas **** mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč bas…ĺa Ňčalan mptusa. kŇčkawas **** maŇčal pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč al-a*ńßa…ĺ na islam ¶…ôsw…ô ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kndusan s…ô…üi**** kjosaŇčto*** *uad masum mniq kŇčkawas **** tumal i…ĺaq kjosaŇčto, kŇčkawas **** musa sj…ĺia mtqita sj…ĺia kjosaŇčto suki kńßalid bakdasńß, wada mkla kńßalid bakdasńß qnita nija s…ôdiq kud daw, *uad masum pa wada malax kjosaŇčto dmi tumal ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč. ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč******** kŇčkawas **** *uad masum u Ňčalan ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč mniq bas…ĺa na dajńßjo, dńßuq kŇčkawas ****. kŇčkawas **** wada mnku…ĺdistan umalu qnlńßaŇčan …ĺj…ônmoŇč (puk) pusu pnńßiju nija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas ****, *uad masum ka mnku…ĺdistan dajńßjotwan ¶Ňčw…ôn mi tb…ĺinańß mijańß bagńßdad, wada mpbatas k…ôŇčpo jiŇčkaj u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, wada mtu* dajńßjo jiŇčkaj na gi ¶jo. soto** spuda i…ĺaq babaw m ¶ ¶bu ńßiti na s…ô…üi k ¶ju, qpańßun ¶oŇč…ĺi i…ĺaq u, kija ka snp…ôjańß knńßba…ĺaw nija sj…ôpaj ka maŇčal qpańßun, qpańßun gikaj na gi ¶jo u sjunnipaj ka maŇčal qpańßun, kija mi soto u s…ôdiq kud ka maŇčal qpańßun. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, *uad masum pa wada pńßjuwan gikaj tu* soto i…ĺaq. kwońßuj u mniq idas * dijax ** muda mn* …ĺw…ôn m…ôtaq ńßjo, mniq *** ńßjo ka k ¶ka bn…ôtaq ńßjo pa, *uad masum u wada maŇčal mbijax *** ńßjo, pnsuŇč ńßija ka ba…ĺńßam sal…ôńß u wana balaj ** ńßjo. mniq m…ôtaq soto ńßjo b…ĺańß ¶ida, …ĺj…ônńßkwo misu ¶aŇč pan ¶iw…ôn u mniq bagńßdad mtqita i…ĺaq ¶oŇč…ĺi ma ¶ ¶ńßili daw mniq k ¶ka ¶i ¶…ôńßuj, …ĺmŇčaw ka ńßija: 'i…ĺaq saja pa wisu sntu…ĺuŇč smtali kndusan, so muda mkala niji u, kasi ka spuda pssli pńßiju kiŇčal niqan balaj llabaŇč lńßbun na s…ôńßu, kiŇčal malu muda psbalaj knkana pnslńßbnan sjakaj ¶junti na s…ôńßu, kija ka knkana qu…ĺi ddaun an…ü…ôŇč, s…ô…üi, sjakaj mi k…ô…üaj'. papak
S.FORM: = Fuad Masum = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Fuad Masum ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Iraq ta sayang o kiya ka Fuad Masum, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Mohamed Fuad Masum (Kari Kud : ŔĀŔąō¶ōßōĮ ŔÖŘēōĻō≥ŔąŔąŔÖ‚Äé, kari Arabian: ŔĀō§ōßōĮ ŔÖōĻōĶŔąŔÖ‚Äé, kngkawas 1938 idas 1 diyax 1Ôľć), mdhu balay sediq Kud seyjicya. Kngkawas 1992 wada mangal Iraq Kurdistan muway bay congri. Mniq kngkawas 2003 mqraq ka Saddam Hussein cngcweyn daw, Fuad Masum ka mnngalan Iraq Kokomin Gikay Rinji Gicyo, kiya u pusu balau snbarah Iraq burah keyngpo uri. Mniq kngkawas 2014 Iraq Gikay seyngkyo mnhdu daw, wada wewan phiyu tu7 soto Iraq, kiya ka lmutuc Jalal Talabani daw tu2 uxay sediq Arabian na soto Iraq. Nrading niya kndusan mi kyoikuśó©śúüÁöĄÁĒüśīĽŚíĆśēôŤā≤ Mohamed Fuad Masum pa mntuting tudaya Iraq nniqan Koya na Khabanen. Mniq Kurdistan pyasan slhayan snhiyan muyas, hiti daw mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Baghdad smluhay horicu mi waya Islam kyo. Kngkawas 1958, Fuad Masum musa Pyasan Tubeyhing Cairo Al-azhar mhdu pnyasan niya tubaraw kyoiku. Kngkawas 1968 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Basra ngalan mptusa. Kngkawas 1975 mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Al-azhar na Islam ceswey hakasey sweywey. Kndusan SeyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į KyosangtoŚÖĪÁĒĘťĽ® Fuad Masum mniq kngkawas 1962 tumal Iraq Kyosangto, kngkawas 1964 musa Syria mtqita Syria Kyosangto suki Khalid Bakdash, wada mkla Khalid Bakdash qnita niya sediq Kud daw, Fuad Masum pa wada malax Kyosangto dmi tumal Kurdistan Mincu Tang. Kurdistan Mincu TangŚļęÁąĺŚĺ∑śĖĮŚĚ¶śįĎšłĽťĽ® Kngkawas 1968 Fuad Masum u ngalan Kurdistan Mincu Tang mniq Basra na dayhyo, dhuq kngkawas 1975. Kngkawas 1976 wada mnKurdistan Umalu Qnlhangan Ryeynmong (PUK) pusu pnhiyu niya uri. Kngkawas 1992, Fuad Masum ka mnKurdistan dayhyotwan cngweyn mi tbrinah miyah Baghdad, wada Mpbatas Keyngpo Yingkay uri. Kngkawas 2004 cida, wada mtu1 Dayhyo Yingkay na gicyo. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Spuda Iraq babaw mccbu hiti na seyji kcyu, qpahun congri Iraq u, kiya ka snpeyyah knhbaraw niya Syeypay ka mangal qpahun, qpahun gikay na gicyo u Syunnipay ka mangal qpahun, kiya mi soto u sediq Kud ka mangal qpahun. Kngkawas 2014 cida, Fuad Masum pa wada phyuwan gikay tu7 soto Iraq. Kwohuy u mniq idas 7 diyax 24 muda mn2 rwen meytaq hyo, mniq 269 hyo ka kcka bneytaq hyo pa, Fuad Masum u wada mangal mbiyax 211 hyo, pnsung hiya ka Barham Saleh u wana balay 17 hyo. Mniq meytaq soto hyo brah cida, Ryeynhkwo misucang Pan Ciwen u mniq Baghdad mtqita Iraq congri Macchili daw mniq kcka cicehuy, rmngaw ka hiya: 'Iraq saya pa wisu snturung smtali kndusan, so muda mkala niyi u, kasi ka spuda pssli phiyu kingal niqan balay llabang lhbun na seyhu, kingal malu muda psbalay knkana pnslhbnan syakay cyunti na seyhu, kiya ka knkana quri ddaun anjeyng, seyji, syakay mi keyjay'. S.PHON: = *uad masum = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka *uad masum ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan i…ĺaq ta sajaŇč o kija ka *uad masum, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. mońßam…ôd *uad masum (ka…ĺi kud : ***** ********, ka…ĺi a…ĺabian: **** ******, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), mdńßu balaj s…ôdiq kud s…ô…üi ¶ja. kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal i…ĺaq ku…ĺdistan muwaj baj ¶oŇč…ĺi. mniq kŇčkawas **** mq…ĺaq ka saddam ńßuss…ôin ¶Ňč ¶w…ôn daw, *uad masum ka mnŇčalan i…ĺaq kokomin gikaj …ĺin…üi gi ¶jo, kija u pusu balau snba…ĺańß i…ĺaq bu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo u…ĺi. mniq kŇčkawas **** i…ĺaq gikaj s…ôŇčkjo mnńßdu daw, wada w…ôwan pńßiju tu* soto i…ĺaq, kija ka lmutu ¶ …üalal talabani daw tu* uxaj s…ôdiq a…ĺabian na soto i…ĺaq. n…ĺadiŇč nija kndusan mi kjoiku******** mońßam…ôd *uad masum pa mntutiŇč tudaja i…ĺaq nniqan koja na kńßaban…ôn. mniq ku…ĺdistan pjasan slńßajan snńßijan mujas, ńßiti daw mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč bagńßdad smluńßaj ńßo…ĺi ¶u mi waja islam kjo. kŇčkawas ****, *uad masum musa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶ai…ĺo al-a*ńßa…ĺ mńßdu pnjasan nija tuba…ĺaw kjoiku. kŇčkawas **** mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč bas…ĺa Ňčalan mptusa. kŇčkawas **** maŇčal pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč al-a*ńßa…ĺ na islam ¶…ôsw…ô ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kndusan s…ô…üi**** kjosaŇčto*** *uad masum mniq kŇčkawas **** tumal i…ĺaq kjosaŇčto, kŇčkawas **** musa sj…ĺia mtqita sj…ĺia kjosaŇčto suki kńßalid bakdasńß, wada mkla kńßalid bakdasńß qnita nija s…ôdiq kud daw, *uad masum pa wada malax kjosaŇčto dmi tumal ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč. ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč******** kŇčkawas **** *uad masum u Ňčalan ku…ĺdistan min ¶u taŇč mniq bas…ĺa na dajńßjo, dńßuq kŇčkawas ****. kŇčkawas **** wada mnku…ĺdistan umalu qnlńßaŇčan …ĺj…ônmoŇč (puk) pusu pnńßiju nija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas ****, *uad masum ka mnku…ĺdistan dajńßjotwan ¶Ňčw…ôn mi tb…ĺinańß mijańß bagńßdad, wada mpbatas k…ôŇčpo jiŇčkaj u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, wada mtu* dajńßjo jiŇčkaj na gi ¶jo. soto** spuda i…ĺaq babaw m ¶ ¶bu ńßiti na s…ô…üi k ¶ju, qpańßun ¶oŇč…ĺi i…ĺaq u, kija ka snp…ôjańß knńßba…ĺaw nija sj…ôpaj ka maŇčal qpańßun, qpańßun gikaj na gi ¶jo u sjunnipaj ka maŇčal qpańßun, kija mi soto u s…ôdiq kud ka maŇčal qpańßun. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, *uad masum pa wada pńßjuwan gikaj tu* soto i…ĺaq. kwońßuj u mniq idas * dijax ** muda mn* …ĺw…ôn m…ôtaq ńßjo, mniq *** ńßjo ka k ¶ka bn…ôtaq ńßjo pa, *uad masum u wada maŇčal mbijax *** ńßjo, pnsuŇč ńßija ka ba…ĺńßam sal…ôńß u wana balaj ** ńßjo. mniq m…ôtaq soto ńßjo b…ĺańß ¶ida, …ĺj…ônńßkwo misu ¶aŇč pan ¶iw…ôn u mniq bagńßdad mtqita i…ĺaq ¶oŇč…ĺi ma ¶ ¶ńßili daw mniq k ¶ka ¶i ¶…ôńßuj, …ĺmŇčaw ka ńßija: 'i…ĺaq saja pa wisu sntu…ĺuŇč smtali kndusan, so muda mkala niji u, kasi ka spuda pssli pńßiju kiŇčal niqan balaj llabaŇč lńßbun na s…ôńßu, kiŇčal malu muda psbalaj knkana pnslńßbnan sjakaj ¶junti na s…ôńßu, kija ka knkana qu…ĺi ddaun an…ü…ôŇč, s…ô…üi, sjakaj mi k…ô…üaj'. papak
